characters.name: Aaron Marshall
characters.description: Aaron MarshallBiographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianEyesBlueStatusDeceasedCause of DeathShot byDanny AlvaradoCareer informationOccupationJunk Yard EmployeeSeries informationEpisodeSafe HarborPortrayed byBlair Jasin Aaron Marshallis a career criminal who was hired by OfficerDanny Alvaradoto kill Raquel Bolivar to cover up his rape. He was a known drug addict, often buying from corner boys who were familiar with his car. He also had a record of minor crimes and would couch surf between friends. At some point, he would cross paths with Officer Alvarado on numerous occasions.

characters.name: Abby McSweeney
characters.description: Abby McSweeneyFull nameAbby McSweeneyBiographical informationGenderFemaleStatusAliveMarital statusDivorcedFamilyJay Halstead(ex-husband)Career informationOccupationSoldier (former)AffiliationArmy RangersSeries informationEpisodeRemember the DevilPortrayed byStephanie Fantauzzi Abby McSweeneyis the ex-wife ofJay Halstead. She was portrayed byStephanie Fantauzzi. Abby andJaymet in the Rangers, where they became good friends. They got married one night whilst they were very drunk in Vegas, after a fellow ranger's funeral. Despite the mistake, it is revealed that Abby harbored true feelings for him and wanted a relationship. However, in the end they split up.

characters.name: Adam Ames
characters.description: Adam AmesFull nameAdam AmesBiographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianHair ColorBrown (graying)EyesgrayStatusIncarceratedMarital statusMarriedFamilyClaire Ames (Wife)Pearl Ames(Daughter)Two unnamed childrenRelationshipsTen Unnamed loversPeter Walker (false Boyfriend)Career informationOccupationCentral Chicago University+ Social Ethics ProfessorAffiliationPeter WalkerSeries informationEpisodeA Night OwlPortrayed byRichard Thomas + Social Ethics Professor ProfessorAdam Amesis a university professor who secretly had a series of multiple affairs with male felons before he ultimately fell forPeter Walker, an ex-convicted con artist that exploited him to transport several loads of drugs into Canada, but he ended up being arrested and Walker's boss ended up abducting his daughter. He was portrayed byRichard Thomas.

characters.name: Adrian Silva
characters.description: Adrian SilvaFull nameAdrian Clay SilvaBiographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityHispanicHair ColorBlackEyesBrownStatusDeceasedCause of DeathSuicideCareer informationOccupationHired HandAffiliationCárabo BakerySeries informationEpisodeCloserPortrayed bySteven Gift Adrian Silvawas a hoodlum who worked forJavier Escano. He's been in and out of foster care but Javier took him in and had him working odd jobs atCárabo Bakeryas well as a runner in his criminal activity. After killing someone outside the bakery, he was wounded by DetectiveHalsteadand treated in the kitchen byAnna Avalos. He was later confronted byHank Voightat his home and shot himself in the head as Escano ordered him to for his failure.

characters.name: Alec Willhite
characters.description: Alec WillhiteFull nameAlec WillhiteBiographical informationGenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianStatusAliveMarital statusWidowerFamilyJulie Willhite†(wife)Emmy Willhite(daughter)Liam Willhite (son)Career informationOccupationPediatricianAffiliationLakeshore MemorialSeries informationFirst seenLast seenStepping StoneYou Never Know Who's WhoPortrayed byErik Hellman Dr.Alec Willhiteis the widower ofJulie Willhite. He was portrayed byErik Hellman. He was a pediatrician atLakeshore Memorial. InStepping Stone, The whole family drives to Julie’s workplace as the kids play in the back. Julie gives Alec money for school events, then gets out and helps Liam from the car while Emmy tells a knock-knock joke. Antonio appears to greet Julie and Alec before they leave, and Julie promises the kids she’ll bring home spaghetti.
